Type of Therapy.value: standard of care (androgen deprivation therapy alone or with intravenous docetaxel 75 mg/m² once every 3 weeks), standard of care plus radiotherapy (74 Gy in 37 fractions administered over 7-8 weeks), standard of care plus abiraterone (oral 1000 mg abiraterone once daily plus oral 5 mg prednisone twice daily), or standard of care plus radiotherapy plus abiraterone

Treatment Class.value: Participants were randomly assigned to standard of care (androgen deprivation therapy alone or with intravenous docetaxel), standard of care plus radiotherapy, standard of care plus abiraterone (oral 1000 mg abiraterone once daily plus oral 5 mg prednisone twice daily), or standard of care plus radiotherapy plus abiraterone.

COE_RCT_IND_OVERALL_RJ.value: Improved overall survival and radiographic progression-free survival with a modest increase in toxicity, mostly hypertension.

PFS Rate (%) | Overall | Treatment.value: Median radiographic progression-free survival: 4.5 years (SOC with abiraterone groups). Hazard ratio for abiraterone vs no abiraterone: 0.54 (99.9% CI 0.41-0-71), p<0.0001. No specific PFS rate (percentage) reported.

PFS Rate (%) | Overall | Control.value: Median radiographic progression-free survival: 2.2 years (SOC without abiraterone groups). No specific PFS rate (percentage) reported.
